channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MODAIRY] Modern Dairies Ltd. Closes Trading Window from 1st April, 2026
item.description:
Modern Dairies Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Modern Dairies Ltd. closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after declaration of financial results
  • Board Meeting date for financial results declaration to be informed later
  • Regulation in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MODERN DAIRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Promoter Group Member Indrani Dasgupta Paul Acquires 0.00440% Stake in Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd
item.description:
Indrani Dasgupta Paul, a member of the Promoter Group and Immediate Relative of Promoter, has acquired 9,380 fully paid-up equity shares (~0.00440%) of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd through an on-market purchase on March 24, 2026. The Promoter and Promoter Group's consolidated shareholding has increased from 68.20909% to 68.21348% post-acquisition.

  • Indrani Dasgupta Paul, a Promoter Group member, acquired 0.00440% stake in Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through an on-market purchase of 9,380 fully paid-up equity shares on March 24, 2026.
  • The Promoter and Promoter Group's shareholding increased from 68.20909% to 68.21348% post-acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SVAMSOF] Svam Software Ltd. Closes Trading Window for Dealing in Securities
item.description:
Svam Software Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in securities. The closure will be in effect from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ended on 31st March 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's code of conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.

  • Svam Software Ltd. closes trading window for dealing in securities.
  • Closure effective from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after declaration of financial results.
  • Decision in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • Company's code of conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading is being followed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SVAM SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon Ltd: Changes in Biocon India Limited Employees Welfare Trust Trustees
item.description:
Biocon Ltd has announced amendments to the Trust Deed of Biocon India Limited Employees Welfare Trust. The amendments include changes in the Trustees of the Trust. The current Trustees, Mr. Krishnachar Nandakumar and Ms. Maninder Kapoor Puri, have resigned from their positions effective from the close of business hours of March 31, 2026. The new Trustees, Mr. Mukesh Karnath and Mr. Naveen Narayanan, have been appointed by mutual consent of the Settler and the new Trustees, with effect from April 01, 2026.

  • Biocon Ltd announces changes in Trustees of Biocon India Limited Employees Welfare Trust
  • Mr. Krishnachar Nandakumar and Ms. Maninder Kapoor Puri resign from their positions as Trustees
  • Mr. Mukesh Karnath and Mr. Naveen Narayanan appointed as new Trustees
  • Changes to take effect from April 01, 2026
  • Amendment to Trust Deed pursuant to SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DIGIFIBRE] Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust Closes Trading Window Until After Q1 and FY 2026 Results
item.description:
Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust has announced the closure of its trading window from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the audited financial information for the last quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026, is made public. The decision aligns with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Trust's policy on unpublished price sensitive information. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of the financial information will be shared in due course.

  • Trading window closure from April 1, 2026
  • Window to reopen 48 hours after Q1 and FY 2026 results announcement
  • Action in accordance with SEBI regulations and Trust's policy
  • Board Meeting date for financial information approval to be shared later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MDRNSTL] Modern Steels Ltd. Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons till 48 hours after Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Modern Steels Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will be closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results for the quarter ended 31st March, 2026 will be informed in due course.

  • Modern Steels Ltd. closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after Q4 and FY results declaration in 2026
  • In accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading also applicable

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MODERN STEELS LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ITDCEM] Cemindia Projects Ltd Elevates Mr. Soumitra Ghosh to Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Cemindia Projects Ltd has announced the elevation of Mr. Soumitra Ghosh, Vice President-Operations, to the category of Senior Management Personnel with effect from 02nd April, 2026. Mr. Ghosh, who holds a Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering and has over 28+ years of experience in Execution of Marine Structures and Project Management, has been associated with the Company since 2003. This elevation is expected to enhance his effectiveness in contributing to the Company’s growth and operational excellence.

  • Cemindia Projects Ltd elevates Mr. Soumitra Ghosh to Senior Management Personnel
  • Mr. Ghosh has over 28+ years of experience in Execution of Marine Structures and Project Management
  • He has been associated with the Company since 2003
  • This elevation is expected to enhance his effectiveness in contributing to the Company’s growth and operational excellence

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITD CEMENTATION INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MCFL] Mayank Cattle Food Ltd Transfers Majority Stake in Subsidiary Nanogen Agrochem
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mayank Cattle Food Ltd has transferred 64.96% of its total 65.00% shareholding in Nanogen Agrochem Private Limited. The subsidiary does not fall under the definition of ‘Material Subsidiary’ as on 31st March, 2025. The subsidiary contributed 0.40% to the consolidated income and 65% to the consolidated net worth of the company in the last financial year. The sale of shares was made on 27.03.2026 to Shingala Chandresh Manilal, who is not a part of the promoter/promoter group/group companies. The transaction is not a related party transaction and is not part of a Scheme of Arrangement.

  • Transfer of 64.96% stake in subsidiary Nanogen Agrochem Private Limited
  • Subsidiary not classified as a ‘Material Subsidiary’
  • Contribution of 0.40% to consolidated income and 65% to consolidated net worth in the last financial year
  • Sale to an unaffiliated third party
  • Not a related party transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mayank Cattle Food Ltd | Category: Subsidiaries

item.title: [LOYALTEX] Loyal Textile Mills Ltd. Insider Trading Window Closed Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Loyal Textile Mills Ltd. has announced that the trading window for dealing in securities of the company for all designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives will be closed from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the fourth quarter ending 31st March 2026. This closure is in accordance with the Company’s code of conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading and SEBI (PIT) (Amendment) Regulations, 2018. The date of the Board meeting for consideration of the financial results will be intimated in due course. All designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives have been informed about the trading window closure on 27/03/2026.

  • Loyal Textile Mills Ltd. has closed the trading window for dealing in securities.
  • The closure is for all designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will last from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 2026 financial results.
  • The closure is in accordance with the Company’s code of conduct and SEBI regulations.
  • The date of the Board meeting for consideration of the financial results will be informed in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LOYAL TEXTILE MILLS LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HIKLASS] Independent Directors Review Performance of Hi-Klass Trading and Investment Ltd for FY 2025-26
item.description:
A separate meeting of the Independent Directors of Hi-Klass Trading and Investment Ltd was held on Friday, 27rd March, 2026. The meeting was conducted virtually through video conferencing at 11.30 A.M. The Independent Directors reviewed the performance of non-independent directors and the board of directors, assessed the performance of the chairperson, and evaluated the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the management and the board. The meeting concluded at 12:00 P.M.

  • Independent Directors meeting for Hi-Klass Trading and Investment Ltd held on 27rd March, 2026
  • Meeting conducted virtually through video conferencing
  • Performance of non-independent directors and the board reviewed
  • Performance of the chairperson assessed
  • Quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between management and board evaluated

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hi-Klass Trading and Investment Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
